text:
SOURCE: 29564653.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (29564653.pdf)
SUMMARY: Recruiting Coordinator with 6+ years supporting various industries. Expert in managing background checks, processing new hire paperwork, and using MS Excel, Taleo, SharePoint, PeopleSoft, and Adobe Professional.
SKILLS: Excel, Human Resources, Training, ADP Software, Pivot Tables, Recruiting, Onboarding, Testing, Administrative Support, Benefits, Integration, Intranet Content, Learning Management System, SharePoint, Adobe Acrobat, Illustration, Illustrator, Indesign, MS Office, MS Outlook, MS Publisher, Outlook, PeopleSoft, Photoshop, Publisher, Applicant Tracking System, Database, Employee Database, Claims, COBRA, Payments, SAP, Award, Budget, Correspondence, ADP Enterprise

SOURCE: 29564653.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Administrator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: February 2015 - Present
DESCRIPTION: ['Provided administrative support to the Director of HR and Sr. Generalist.', 'Verified employment requests for present and former employees; Ev5 and SAP.', 'Processed unemployment claims same day via fax and mail.', 'Entered benefit enrollments for new hires in Ev5.', 'Onboarded new hire paperwork in ADP Ev5 and SAP; processed I9 paperwork.', 'E-verified all new hires.', 'Managed monthly COBRA payments using Excel spreadsheet.']

SOURCE: 29564653.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Administrator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: November 2014 - January 2015
DESCRIPTION: ['Provided administrative support to the Sr. Director of HR, HR Assistant and Coordinator.', 'Managed background checks; physician, physician assistants and nurses in ADP Select and EP Staff Check.', 'Processed I9 documents; copy, scan and file.', 'Updated benefit information in ADP Enterprise; add beneficiaries, change of address, dependents.', 'Assembled corporate handbook and benefit packages for new hires.']

SOURCE: 29564653.pdf
JOB TITLE: Recruiting Coordinator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: June 2014 - November 2014
DESCRIPTION: ['Provided administrative support to the Director of HR and 3 Recruiters.', 'Uploaded and tracked new hire paperwork in Taleo; Applications, CV, Credentials.', 'Maintained and updated employee database report via MS Excel; i.e. pivot tables, charts, vlookup and filters.', 'Scanned and uploaded documents in Applicant tracking system.']

SOURCE: 29564653.pdf
JOB TITLE: Administrative Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: February 2014 - May 2014
DESCRIPTION: ['Provided efficient and professional administrative support to the Department and Dean of Liberal Arts & Sciences.', 'Prepared department communication, correspondence, and memos.', 'Created awards certificate.', 'Maintained graduate award budget via MS Excel; stipend, tuition and fees.', 'Compiled graduate awards data for MS Excel spreadsheet.', 'Maintained department calendars.', 'Assisted with requests from Faculty, Staff, and Student Body.']

SOURCE: 29564653.pdf
JOB TITLE: Human Resources Communications and Staffing Specialist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: April 2013 - December 2013
DESCRIPTION: ['Compiled latest news from Wellness, President, Benefits, and Human Resources onto SharePoint weekly.', 'Coordinated and maintained intranet content and design to ensure consistency, integration, accuracy, and usability.', 'Managed reports in Learning Management Systems; courses that was taken, who signed up to take the eCourses.', 'Designed print media such as posters, brochures, newsletters, and handbooks.', 'Uploaded eCourses in Learning Management System.', 'Assisted with the development of employee training program materials and managing training programs on the Learning Management System.']

SOURCE: 29564653.pdf
JOB TITLE: Recruiting Coordinator - Human Resources
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: September 2007 - April 2013
DESCRIPTION: ['Managed & troubleshoot ADP software, background check and drug testing for 45 campus locations.', 'Compiled new hire packages.', 'Managed complex monthly billing using MS Excel -- VLookup & Pivot tables.', 'Organized webinar training for newly hired human resources personal.', 'Trained human resources personal on using ADP, Labcorp and eScreen software.', 'Assisted with organizing onboarding agenda and materials.', 'Compiled and distributed monthly termination report via ePrise.']

SOURCE: 29564653.pdf
JOB TITLE: Administrative Assistant - Education Department
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: January 2006 - January 2007
DESCRIPTION: ['Provided efficient and professional administrative support to the Department and Dean of Liberal Arts & Sciences.']

SOURCE: 29564653.pdf
DEGREE: Bachelor of Fine Arts in Visual Communication
INSTITUTION: American InterContinental University, Schaumburg, IL
